paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

balanceOf(address,uint256).notice: returns the balance of a user

core().notice: address of the Core contract referenced

emergencyAction((address,uint256,bytes)[.notice: due to inflexibility of current smart contracts, add this ability to be able to execute arbitrary calldata against arbitrary addresses. callable only by governor

globalPoints(uint32).notice: mapping of epoch to global point

lastGlobalPointEpoch().notice: last global point's epoch for direct access

rewardWeightBiasIncreases(uint32).notice: mapping of epoch to positive bias changes

rewardWeightDecreases(uint32).notice: mapping of epoch to negative slope changes

rewardWeightIncreases(uint32).notice: mapping of epoch to positive slope changes

setCore(address).notice: WARNING CALLING THIS FUNCTION CAN POTENTIALLY BRICK A CONTRACT IF CORE IS SET INCORRECTLYset new reference to core only callable by governor

slashIndex().notice: slashing index, starts at 1e18 and decreases every time there is a slash

totalReceiptTokens().notice: total amount of receipt tokens in the contract, excluding donations

totalShares().notice: total shares of locked tokens in the contract

withdraw(uint256,address).notice: Withdraw after an unwinding period has completed
